description: Import the bookmark collection from /home/ga/Documents/research_bookmarks.html into Tor Browser. Verify the imported folders ('Digital Archives', 'Press Freedom Organizations', 'Academic Resources', and 'Tor Network Resources') are present. Confirm Tor connectivity via https://check.torproject.org/ and ensure https://archive.org/ loads correctly. Create a new bookmark folder named 'Censorship Research' and add a bookmark for https://pen.org/ with the title 'PEN America - Literary Freedom' inside that folder.
